nodes.name: 塞拉利昂
nodes.summary: 塞拉利昂是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联88种鸟类，包括Blue quail、Ahanta spurfowl、Yellow-billed turaco等88种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 低繁殖率
nodes.summary: 繁殖周期长且单次成功育雏率有限。

nodes.name: 加纳
nodes.summary: 加纳是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联98种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl等98种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown-cheeked hornbill
nodes.summary: Brown-cheeked hornbill（Brown-cheeked hornbill，学名 Bycanistes cylindricus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、低繁殖率。

nodes.name: 多哥
nodes.summary: 多哥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联64种鸟类，包括White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl、Blue-headed coucal等64种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 科特迪瓦

nodes.name: 利比里亚
nodes.summary: 利比里亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联82种鸟类，包括Ahanta spurfowl、Yellow-billed turaco、Blue-headed coucal等82种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Upper Guinean forests
nodes.summary: The Upper Guinean forests is a tropical seasonal forest region of West Africa.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown-cheeked hornbill is native to the Upper Guinean forests region of tropical West Africa, its range including southern Guinea, Sierra Leone, Liberia, Ivory Coast, southwestern Ghana and Togo

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction, as timber is harvested and the forests become increasingly fragmented

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Many of the forested areas within its range have disappeared, being replaced by agricultural land and oil palm and other plantations, however it is present in a number of protected areas. Hunting the birds for sale as live birds or for use as bushmeat is a significant threat for hornbills, and because of their low reproductive rate, species like the brown-cheeked hornbill are put at risk by this practice.{{cite book|author1=Sodhi, Navjot S
